data.content: Branch: feat/model-search-picker (remote). Two commits: 232f3d92 (feat: add searchable model picker) and 8e94014d (fix: conditional source). All quality gates pass: lint, tsc, 2628 vitest tests, bash model-picker tests (14/14), and next build. Implementation adds scripts/model-picker.sh with interactive search picker (case-insensitive substring filter, arrow key navigation, Enter to select, Esc to clear, backspace support, match count display). Integrated into setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh with threshold gate (>20 models triggers search mode). Both child knots (ec3a, cd7e) are in ready_for_shipment.
